Tests that `Object.prototype.toString` returns "[object Number]" for the number 123.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Object.prototype.toString` method when called on a number. It verifies that the method returns the string `"[object Number]"` when applied to the number `123`. This test ensures that the JavaScript environment correctly identifies the type of a number object. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating the output of a single method call.
